candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; populated and more specific/preferred over identical total row.
Also matches top-line revenue, but is a total/subtotal and duplicates Revenue.
Possible alternate revenue label across periods, though empty in preview.
Not revenue; this is cost line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Not revenue; depreciation component within COGS.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue label changes; Revenue is preferred, Net Sales and Total Revenue are fallbacks.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label and populated; best semantic match.
Also matches COGS/cost of sales and is populated.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; should be avoided when direct COGS rows exist.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Only a depreciation component, not full COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only a depreciation component within COGS, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the direct COGS line; excluded balancing and depreciation component rows.

candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead component; populated.
Core SG&A overhead component; populated.
Closest additional overhead bucket available; not a total/subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

D&A within SG&A; excluded per rules.

variables.notes: No explicit consolidated SG&A row is populated; selected best overhead components and excluded D&A rows and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Direct reported R&D-type expense line; best match for research/development expense.

Only a depreciation component, not the full R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Only a lease depreciation component, not the full R&D expense line.
D&A component only.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated Amortization of Product and software development
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct development expense line as XRD.

candidates.why: Most direct interest expense label; preferred over broader finance expense.
Direct interest expense label and useful as fallback if populated in other periods, though empty in preview.
Broader finance expense line including non-interest items; acceptable fallback only if direct interest expense unavailable.
Only a component and not necessarily interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest-related but supplemental and only one component of total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: direct interest expense first, broader financial expenses only as fallback.

candidates.why: Best equity line excluding non-controlling interest; populated across years.
Ambiguous and not clearly the main equity line.

Balancing row; not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row; not equity.
Total balance sheet line, not equity.

variables.notes: Preferred Shareholders equity because it excludes non-controlling interest, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent alternate balance sheet label for NCI.
Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution total, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not minority equity balance.
